2605.00433.title: Improving LLM Code Generation via Requirement-Aware Curriculum Reinforcement Learning
2605.00433.paper_summary: Code generation, which aims to automatically generate source code from given programming requirements, has the potential to substantially improve software development efficiency. With the rapid advancement of large language models (LLMs), LLM-based code generation has attracted widespread attention from both academia and industry. However, as programming requirements become increasingly complex, existing LLMs still exhibit notable performance limitations. To address this challenge, recent studies have proposed training-based curriculum reinforcement learning (CRL) strategies to improve LLM code generation performance. Despite their effectiveness, existing CRL approaches suffer from several limitations, including misaligned requirement difficulty perception, the absence of requirement difficulty optimization, and suboptimal curriculum sampling strategies. In CRL-based code generation, programming requirements serve as the sole input to the model, making their quality and difficulty critical to training effectiveness. Motivated by insights from software requirements engineering, we propose RECRL, a novel requirement-aware curriculum reinforcement learning framework for enhancing LLM-based code generation. RECRL automatically perceives model-specific requirement difficulty, optimizes challenging requirements to improve training data utilization, and employs an adaptive curriculum sampling strategy to construct training batches with smoothly varying difficulty. Extensive experiments on five state-of-the-art LLMs across five widely-used code generation benchmarks by comparing with five state-of-the-art baselines, demonstrate the significant effectiveness of RECRL. For example, RECRL achieves an average Pass@1 improvement of 1.23%-5.62% over all state-of-the-art baselines.
2605.00433.paper_summary_zh: 程式碼生成旨在根據給定的程式設計需求自動生成源代碼，具有顯著提高軟體開發效率的潛力。隨著大型語言模型（LLMs）的快速發展，基於LLM的程式碼生成吸引了學術界和業界的廣泛關注。然而，隨著程式設計需求變得越來越複雜，現有的LLM仍然表現出顯著的性能限制。為了解決這一挑戰，最近的研究提出了基於訓練的課程強化學習（CRL）策略，以改善LLM的程式碼生成性能。儘管它們有效，但現有的CRL方法仍然存在幾個限制，包括需求難度感知的不一致、缺乏需求難度優化以及次優的課程抽樣策略。在基於CRL的程式碼生成中，程式設計需求作為模型的唯一輸入，使其質量和難度對訓練效果至關重要。受到軟體需求工程見解的啟發，我們提出了RECRL，一種新穎的需求感知課程強化學習框架，用於增強基於LLM的程式碼生成。RECRL自動感知模型特定的需求難度，優化挑戰性需求以提高訓練數據的利用率，並採用自適應課程抽樣策略來構建具有平滑變化難度的訓練批次。在五個廣泛使用的程式碼生成基準上對五個最先進的LLM進行的廣泛實驗，通過與五個最先進的基線進行比較，展示了RECRL的顯著有效性。例如，RECRL在所有最先進的基線上實現了平均Pass@1提升1.23%-5.62%。
2605.00433.author: Shouyu Yin et.al.
2605.00433.authors: Shouyu Yin, Zhao Tian, Junjie Chen, Shikai Guo
